title: Capricorn November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

rank_math_title: Capricorn November 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Capricorn November 2026 monthly horoscope — key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Obsidian). New Moon Nov 8 in Scorpio (community, friends); Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (work, health); Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 in Leo (intimacy, shared money).
content:
Capricorn November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeRefine the circle, restore the routine
Key DatesVenus + Mercury station direct Nov 13 / New Moon Nov 8 (Scorpio, 11th house) / Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 (Leo, your 8th) / Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (6th house)
Love8th house Mars conjunct Jupiter deepens intimacy and shared resources; the 11th house New Moon reopens friendship-rooted connections
Career11th house Scorpio New Moon reopens community and collective vision; the 6th house Full Moon is a work and health climax
Crystal of the MonthObsidian
Lucky ColorsDeep black, glossy onyx, charcoal gray
Lucky Number6
AffirmationI refine the circle I lead with; I restore the routine that carries me.

This Month's Energy

Capricorn, November 2026 refines the circle and restores the routine. Venus and Mercury both station direct on November 13, releasing October's retrograde season. The New Moon in Scorpio on November 8 falls in your 11th house of community, friends, collective vision, and long-term dreams — a fresh start in who you build with. Then November 16 brings Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53' Leo, your 8th house of intimacy, shared resources, and psychological depth — a peak around shared finance or private bond. November 24 brings the Beaver Full Moon in Gemini, your 6th house of work, routine, and health — a climax around daily systems. November's pattern: refine the circle early, restore the routine late.

Key Dates for Capricorn in November 2026

DateTransitMeaning for CapricornDo / Avoid
Nov 8New Moon in Scorpio11th house — fresh start in community, friends, collective vision, long-term dreams; commit to the circle you're building withDo: claim the role in the group, mend the friendship, name the dream
Avoid: holding onto a circle that no longer fits
Nov 13Venus + Mercury station directStation day — the retrograde season ends; clarity returns to friendship, role, and communication mattersDo: move forward on the friendship, sign the alliance, send the message
Avoid: rushing decisions in the 3 days around the station
Nov 16Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53' Leo8th house — intimacy, shared resources, psychological depth peak; a once-every-two-years amplification of shared finance and private bondsDo: address the intimacy, renegotiate the shared account, claim the depth
Avoid: power struggles over shared resources at the peak
Nov 24Beaver Full Moon in Gemini6th house — climax around work, routine, health, daily systems; a long-building wellness or work-rhythm matter maturesDo: commit to the routine, organize the systems, address the health
Avoid: pushing the body past its natural pace
Nov 22Sun enters Sagittarius12th house season — rest, closure, the unconscious through late DecemberDo: rest, complete, dream, tend to the unseen
Avoid: spreading across too many public commitments
Early NovMars moves through Leo (your 8th)Intimacy, shared resources stay active; the run-up to Nov 16 builds the depth momentumDo: address the shared finance, soften the deep bond
Avoid: avoiding the depth conversation

Career & Money

For Capricorn, November's career story opens with the collective and culminates in the daily work. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 falls in your 11th house of community, friends, and long-term vision — a fresh start in who you build with.

The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 6th house) is the work and routine climax — a long-building daily system or wellness matter matures. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 8th house on November 16 peaks around shared finance, commission, or royalty. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 12th house) on November 22 opens a season of behind-the-scenes work. Crystals for wealth can support the patience; the practical move is refine the circle early, restore the routine late.

Love & Relationships

The Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 8th house on November 16 is the love signature of the month for Capricorn: intimacy as the gateway to depth. A once-every-two-years amplification of private bonds, shared resources, and psychological closeness peaks.

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 11th house of friends) reopens friendship-rooted connections — a friend may become more. Venus stationing direct on November 13 releases the friendship and romance review. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 12th house) on November 22 deepens the rest-and-closure season. Crystals for love can support the depth; the deeper practice is refining the circle so the depth can be honest.

Health & Wellness

November's wellness story emphasizes bones, joints, and the work-rest balance. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 6th house) is the wellness climax — a long-building routine or health matter reaches a turning point. Commit to the sustainable rhythm.

Obsidian, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with grounding, protection, truth-telling, and the release of old patterns — a useful symbolic companion for a Saturn-ruled earth sign emerging from a retrograde season. Capricorn often carries tension in the knees, bones, and joints; gentle skeletal movement, warm food, and rest are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Obsidian

Why Obsidian fits Capricorn this month. You are Saturn-ruled — your reflex is structure, ambition, the long climb. November asks you to refine the circle, restore the routine, and tend the depth. Obsidian — volcanic glass, deep black — is traditionally tied to grounding, protection, truth-telling, and the release of old patterns. Where Garnet would ground and Onyx would shield, Obsidian cuts through to clarity. Perfect for the 11th house Scorpio New Moon (refine the circle) and the 6th house Gemini Full Moon (restore the routine).

How to use it during November 2026. Place Obsidian at your workspace or in the center of your home on November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Carry it during any intimacy or work-routine conversation through November 24.

Best date to use it: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 6th house — hold Obsidian at your root for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming the routine you're committing to and the circle it serves.

Read more: Obsidian Meaning and Best Crystals for Capricorn.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Capricorn — November 2026

When: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 6th house.
Crystal: Obsidian.
Intention: Restore the routine the circle is meant to carry.

  1. Cleanse Obsidian under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Place it in the center of your workspace through November 8.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (November 8–24): write down three friends or collaborators you're refining the dream with — and the routine you're ready to commit to at the Full Moon.
  3. Act at the Beaver Full Moon on November 24: commit to the routine, organize the systems, address the body's needs. Obsidian in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Capricorn New Moon in January 2027 (your 1st house): how has the routine matured through the winter? Hold Obsidian during the review.

Shop Capricorn Crystals for November 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Capricorn crystal guide for stones connected with grounding, truth, structure, and the long climb — including the Obsidian that cuts through to clarity after a retrograde season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Capricorn November 2026

Is November 2026 a good month for Capricorn?

It's a refine-and-restore month. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 11th house) reopens community and long-term dreams. Venus and Mercury station direct on November 13. The Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16 (your 8th house) is a shared-finance and intimacy peak. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 6th house) is a work and health climax.

How will the Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16 affect Capricorn?

The conjunction in your 8th house of intimacy, shared resources, and psychological depth is a once-every-two-years amplification. Address the shared finance; renegotiate the intimacy; claim the depth. Power struggles are the warning sign at the peak.

What does the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 mean for Capricorn?

It falls in your 6th house of work, routine, and health — a climax around daily systems and wellness. Commit to the routine; organize the systems; address the body's needs.

What is the best crystal for Capricorn in November 2026?

Obsidian — it cuts through to clarity, exactly what an 11th house Scorpio New Moon (refine the circle) plus a 6th house Gemini Full Moon (restore the routine) demand after a retrograde. See the full Capricorn crystal guide →

Why does the Sun entering my 12th house on November 22 ask Capricorn to rest?

The Sun's entry into Sagittarius (your 12th house of closure and the unconscious) on November 22 opens your annual pre-birthday rest season. The routine you commit to at the November 24 Full Moon needs the rest of December to be sustainable.
